query: DELETE FROM lessons WHERE courseId IN (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE courseId IN (SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'BIB101') ORDER BY lessonOrder LIMIT 10) AS keep);
